courses.course: Ph.D. in Computer Science and Technology
B.Sc. in Computer Science and Technology

timeline.title: Ph.D. Student
timeline.company: Softwiser Group, Institute of Computer Software, Nanjing University
timeline.summary: Research on large language models for software engineering under the supervision of Yuan Yao and Feng Xu.
highlights: Focus on test suite evolution, program repair, and software quality automation.
Continue exploring test generation as a long-term research direction.
Published work at ASE 2025, ECAI 2025, and ISSTA 2025.

timeline.title: Research Intern
timeline.company: Ant Group, Platform Engineering and Technology Department
timeline.summary: Worked on intelligent understanding and generation of software changes in the CodeFuse group.
highlights: Participated in research and engineering around software change understanding and generation.
Worked at the intersection of developer tooling and large language models.
Gained industry experience on practical software intelligence systems.

timeline.title: LLM Algorithm Intern (Code)
timeline.summary: Worked as an intern on code-oriented large language model algorithms.
highlights: Focused on code intelligence scenarios for large language models.
Bridged academic research interests with large-scale industrial model work.
Expanded experience in practical deployment-oriented LLM systems.
